prestazioni: Engine: 3.0L EcoDiesel Hurricane I6 (code: **EZD**) – Full forced-induction upgrade with a **Garrett GTX5533R** turbocharger (1.35 A/R turbine housing, billet compressor wheel, 88mm inducer) paired with a **Hellcat-sourced intercooler core** (custom 4.5" thick bar-and-plate design by **VMP Performance**) and **Silicone Intakes** 4-ply reinforced charge pipes (3.5" ID) from **TurboSmart** to handle 35 psi boost. Supporting mods include a **FIC 2000cc/min port-injection fuel kit** (dual **ID1700x** injectors) and a **Motec M150 ECU** with **EZD-specific flex-fuel mapping** for E85 compatibility.

Drivetrain: **ZF 8HP95** 8-speed transmission reinforced with a **Peloquin LSD** (40% lockup) in the rear Dana 44 axle (3.92:1 gears) and a **Quaife ATB differential** in the front Dana 30. **South Bend Clutch** twin-disc setup (organic/carbon hybrid) with a **Tilton 7.25" flywheel** for the EZD’s 550 lb-ft torque output. **Driveshaft Shop** 3.5" aluminum driveshafts with **Spicer 1350 U-joints** for durability.

Suspension/Handling: **Öhlins TTX46** coilovers (24-way adjustable damping, 2.5" monotube design) with **Eibach ERS** helper springs (200 lb/in rate) and **Whiteline** front/rear sway bars (28mm hollow, adjustable end links). **Brembo GT 6-piston calipers** (405mm rotors, two-piece floating design) up front with **Ferodo DS2500** pads, paired with **StopTech STR** stainless steel brake lines. **Nitto Ridge Grappler** 285/50R22 tires on **HRE FF03** 22x12" wheels (ET25, 5x139.7 bolt pattern) for 1.5g lateral grip.
estetica: Body: **Rocket Bunny V3** widebody kit (carbon fiber fenders, 3.5" flares, custom rear diffuser) with **Seibon** carbon fiber hood (vented, 2x3" heat extractors) and **Vorsteiner** carbon fiber front splitter (3-piece, adjustable dive planes). **Luxx** LED headlight retrofit (Bi-Xenon projectors, **Morimoto XB35** bulbs) with **Diode Dynamics** sequential turn signals (RGB, 16-color customizable).

Interior: **Recaro Pole Position** seats (carbon fiber shells, Alcantara/leather upholstery) with **Schroth Profi II-6** 6-point harnesses. **Momo Mod.78** steering wheel (350mm, suede, quick-release hub) and **Aim Solo 2 DL** data logger mounted on a **Custom Cages** bolt-in roll bar (6-point, T45 chromoly). **Alcantara headliner** with **Dynamat Xtreme** sound deadening (3mm thick) and **Focal Utopia** 3-way component speakers (10" subwoofer in custom enclosure).

Lighting/Details: **Anzo USA** LED taillights (sequential, smoked lenses) with **Luxx** puddle lights (RGB, 12-color customizable). **VMR V710** 22x12" wheels (matte bronze, concave design) with **Nitto Ridge Grappler** tires (285/50R22, 3-ply sidewall). **Vorsteiner** carbon fiber mirror caps and **Rally Innovations** roof rack (aluminum, 200lb load capacity) with **Baja Designs** Squadron Pro auxiliary lights (50W, amber/copper lenses).
